title: Announcements
content:
Announcements

Erasmus+

Announcements

List of Students Eligible to Participate in the Erasmus+ Student Mobility for Studies under the Project No. 2025-1-TR01-KA131-HED-00031955

26
						December

2025

Erasmus scores (50% language
score and 50% GPA) were taken into consideration, and the

Final Erasmus Score

was calculated according to the evaluation criteria and weighted scoring table
used in the previous announcement regarding mobility applications.

The
list of all students who participated in the exam held between

and have been
selected to benefit from the Erasmus program for the

2026–2027 Academic Year (Fall and Spring Semesters)

has
been announced.

Grant
allocations have been distributed equally among the faculties based on
application and quota status.

Students
who have been selected with grant support
but do not participate in the mobility without
officially withdrawing will receive a 10-point
deduction in their next Erasmus application.

Students
who wish to withdraw from the study
mobility must send their Withdrawal Petitionto

erasmus@okan.edu.tr

no later than

16
January 2026 (23:59)

.

Students
who are on the reserve list may
choose to continue their mobility and procedures without
grant support. Those who wish to continue without a grant must send an
e-mail to

erasmus@okan.edu.tr

stating their name–surname, student number, and department, along with
the expression “I would like to participate
in the mobility without grant support.”

For
appeals, students must send their Appeal Petition to

erasmus@okan.edu.tr

by

5
January 2026 (23:59)

. The final list may change after the evaluation
of appeal petitions. Please follow the announcements on our website.

Students
with a Final Erasmus Score below 60 points
are not eligible for participation.

IMPORTANT NOTE:

Please note that all study mobility
activities must be completed by

31 July
2027

.

Click to view Tuition Grants.

Click to view List of Those Eligible to Participate.
